name: VisionCraft MCP Server
what_it_does: VisionCraft MCP server enabling AI agents to generate images using multiple AI image generation models — integrating Stable Diffusion, FLUX, and other text-to-image models via VisionCraft API, managing generation parameters (resolution, steps, CFG scale, LoRA), and embedding image generation capabilities into agent-driven creative and content workflows.
use_cases: Generating images from text prompts for content creation from creative agents
Producing custom illustrations for blog posts and marketing from content agents
Creating concept art and visual mockups from design workflow agents
Generating product images for e-commerce from inventory management agents
Building image generation pipelines with parameter control from automation agents
Experimenting with multiple AI image models from research agents
not_for: Photo editing or image manipulation (generation only, not editing existing images)
High-volume commercial image production (API rate limits apply)
Teams needing on-premise/local model deployment without API
best_when: An agent needs to generate images from text descriptions using multiple AI models — VisionCraft provides access to FLUX, Stable Diffusion variants, and other models via a unified API.
avoid_when: You need local/offline image generation without API calls, or require editing of existing images rather than generation from scratch.

auth.notes: VisionCraft API key required. Register at VisionCraft platform for API access. Store API key as environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: VisionCraft API: limited free credits on signup
pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-generation pricing based on model and resolution
pricing.notes: VisionCraft API offers free credits. Paid usage based on generation volume. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: VisionCraft API: tier-dependent rate limits on concurrent generations

known_agent_gotchas: Image generation latency is high (5-30s) — design agents with async/polling patterns
VisionCraft API is a smaller provider — uptime and support less established than major providers
Generated images may not be stored persistently — download and save immediately after generation
NSFW filters and content moderation policies may reject certain prompts
API credits can deplete quickly with high-resolution or complex generations — monitor usage
Community MCP — feature completeness depends on which VisionCraft API endpoints are wrapped
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Store API key as environment variable. Generated images sent via API — review VisionCraft data retention policies. No sensitive user data in prompts.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Review data retention for generated images. Community MCP.
